details.test: Task 1: Beginner-friendly Python project with Contribution Guide
Task 2: Subscribe to weekly updates for two popular Python projects
Task 3: Bookmark project with fewer open security issues (top two by stars)
Task 4: Add three contribution policies to reading list
Task 5: Submit new project proposal for Data Pipeline Toolkit
Task 6: Register for a midday Open Source License Compliance workshop
Task 7: Pin MIT UI component library with design guidelines and Storybook
Task 8: Add highest-impact critical advisory to risk watchlist
Task 9: Volunteer for short documentation issue
